problem:
fix(frontend/autopilot): improve AutoPilot OS push notification icon and copy. ## Summary

The OS-level push notification fired by AutoPilot when a task completes has two issues on iOS (and likely Android):

1. **Icon quality is poor** — appears to be the site favicon rendered at a low resolution. iOS up-scales it and it looks blurry/pixelated next to other apps' notification icons.
2. **Copy is unclear** — the current body text reads "A response is waiting for you". It should be "Task completed
memory_hint:
This is a known recurring issue. The temporary fix is: fix(frontend/autopilot): improve AutoPilot OS push notification icon and copy. Mockup of the desired notification (provided by user):

![Desired notification mockup](https://uploads.linear.app/a47946b. This works for now but you will need to apply it again when the issue returns. The root cause is Unknown failure.
